name: EuiAspectRatio

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

height.description: Aspect ratio height. For example 9 would be widescreen video.

width.description: Aspect ratio width. For example 16 would be widescreen video.

maxWidth.description: The maximum width you want the child to stretch to.

example: <EuiAspectRatio height={9} width={16} maxWidth="100%" backgroundColor="gray" display="flex" alignItems="center" justifyContent="center" />
